name: ChatGPT
tagline: OpenAI's AI assistant — the tool that started the AI revolution, now with image generation, voice, and browsing.
description:
ChatGPT is OpenAI's consumer AI product and the most widely used AI assistant in the world. It runs on GPT-4o, which handles text, images, audio, and video inputs, and integrates DALL-E 3 for image generation directly in the chat. The free tier is generous; Plus unlocks faster responses, higher limits, and access to the full GPT-4o model.

Custom GPTs let you build specialized assistants with specific instructions and knowledge bases. The Pro plan ($200/mo) adds unlimited access and o1 pro mode — OpenAI's most capable reasoning model — making it the go-to for researchers and power users who need maximum throughput.
features: Multimodal — handles text, images, audio, and video input
Advanced voice mode with natural conversation
Code interpreter for data analysis and visualization
o1 reasoning model for complex problem-solving
pros: Most feature-rich AI assistant available — text, images, voice, code, browsing
Largest ecosystem of custom GPTs and integrations
Free tier is genuinely useful with access to GPT-4o
cons: Can confidently hallucinate facts — always verify important claims
Usage limits on Plus hit harder than advertised during peak hours
